lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: Welcome to the Grand Exchange. Would you like to trade now, or exchange item sets?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this voucher for completing the combat Adventure Path, it says to come talk to you about claiming my Adventure Path reward.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: Why yes, here is your reward.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: If you wanted to, you could store the coins in the bank next to me.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I use the Grand Exchange?

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: My colleague and I can let you set up trade offers. You can offer to Sell items or Buy items.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: When you want to sell something, you give us the items and tell us how much money you want for them.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: We'll look for someone who wants to buy those items at your price, and we'll perform the trade. You can then collect the cash here, or at any bank.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: When you want to buy something, you tell us what you want, and give us the cash you're willing to spend on it.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: We'll look for someone who's selling those items at your price, and we'll perform the trade. You can then collect the items here, or at any bank, along with any left-over cash.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: Sometimes it takes a while to find a matching trade offer. If you change your mind, we'll let you cancel your trade offer, and we'll return your unused items and cash.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: That's all the essential information you need to get started. Would you like to trade now, or exchange item sets?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to set up trade offers please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help me with item sets?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like Exchange collection reminders on login, please.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: Okay, when you log in, we'll send you a message about any items that are waiting for you to collect them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want Exchange collection reminders on login.

lines.speaker: Grand Exchange Clerk
lines.text: Okay, when you log in, you will no longer be reminded about items waiting to be collected, unless the items only arrived after you logged out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.
